Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
from app.database import engine
from sqlalchemy import inspect
inspector = inspect\(engine\)
tables = inspector.get_table_names\(\)
print\('Tables:', tables\)
for t in tables:
    cols = inspector.get_columns\(t\)
    print\(f'\\n{t}:'\)
    for c in cols:
        print\(f'  {c[\\"name\\"]} - {c[\\"type\\"]}'\)
")

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
from app.database import SessionLocal
from app.models import Conversation

db = SessionLocal\(\)
convs = db.query\(Conversation\).all\(\)
for c in convs:
    if c.title == 'Yeni söhbət' and c.messages:
        first_msg = [m for m in c.messages if m.role == 'user']
        if first_msg:
            c.title = first_msg[0].content[:40]
            print\(f'Updated: {c.id} -> {c.title}'\)
db.commit\(\)
db.close\(\)
")

from app.rag import get_or_create_collection

        print\(f'--- Chunk {i} ---'\)
        print\(doc[:300]\)
        print\(\)
else:
    print\('No chunks in ChromaDB'\)
")

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
from app.rag import search
tests = ['Salam', 'Necəsən?', 'Pizza necə bişirilir?', 'Sağ ol', 'Boşanma prosesi necədir?', 'Aliment ödənişləri', 'Uşaq hüquqları', 'Hava necədir?', 'Futbol']
for t in tests:
    result = search\(t\)
    d = round\(result['distances'][0], 3\) if result['distances'] else 'N/A'
    print\(f'{d}  ←  {t}'\)
")
